title: Peeler for Kitchen | 360 Rotating Potato Peeler | 3 in 1 Multi Vegetable Straight Serrated Julienne Peeler | Kitchen Gadgets & Tools
features: ★ 3 in 1 Kitchen Peeler: Great multi-purpose peeler for your kitchen. 360 rotating head to choose the right blade for your needs. Also a food safe product.

★ Kitchen Tools & Gadgets: 3 in 1 potato peeler with multifunctional blades for cutting, peeling, shredding and slicing all your fruits and vegetables. Perfect for peeling those potatoes, carrots, zucchini, apples. Portable and easy to take for camping, picnic, BBQ party etc.

★ High Quality Peeler: The kitchen peeler is made of high-quality stainless steel, sharp blades and PP plastic, durable, not easy to rust or break. Multifunctional and fast peeling. Fast, and easy to use.

★ 3 in 1 Potato Peeler: Vegetable Peeler with 3 extra strong rotation straight blades, serrated and julienne blades makes it easier and easier to peel different fruits and vegetables in 3 different ways. Peeling, cutting, and slicing fruit is no longer a chore with this speedy peeler. Straight peeler for firm fruits and vegetables like potato, carrots, apples etc. Serrated peeler for soft fruits and vegetables like cucumber, tomatoes, cabbage etc. Julienne peeler for strands of vegetable, salads, coleslaws etc.

★ Ergonomic grip: The peeler handle is ergonomically designed with a comfortable curve for an easy grip, helps prevent wrist fatigue or pain allowing for easy peeling. A great addition to your kitchen utensils.
